evals.prompt: förklara vad coolThing repo:t gör och vilka filer jag bör börja med
evals.expected_behavior: Inspect repo structure and summarize primary surfaces, workflows, and likely next files.
evals.expected_output: Repo-oriented summary with files inspected and next action.

evals.prompt: planera en liten ändring i coolThing utan att koda ännu
evals.expected_behavior: Ground the plan in actual repo files and mention narrower skills if applicable.
evals.expected_output: Concise plan with relevant files and risks.

evals.prompt: reviewa coolThing på hög nivå och säg vad som verkar viktigast att fixa
evals.expected_behavior: Use code-review stance and repository context to prioritize high-signal findings.
evals.expected_output: Findings first, then brief summary and checks skipped.

evals.prompt: ändra PromptImage så OpenAI-felet blir tydligare i UI:t
evals.expected_behavior: Should use prompt-image-maintainer because the requested surface is specific.
Should use release-readiness because this is a release gate.
